testcase.name: test_categories_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'categories': [{'icon': 'film', 'id': 'movie_stars', 'name': 'Movie Stars'}, {'icon': 'tv', 'id': 'tv_actors', 'name': 'TV Actors'}, {'icon': 'video', 'id': 'tv_personalities', 'name': 'TV Personalities'}, {'icon': 'music', 'id': 'musicians', 'name': 'Musicians'}, {'icon': 'trophy', 'id': 'athletes', 'name': 'Athletes'}, {'icon': 'crown', 'id': 'royals', 'name': 'Royals'}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_21_recognition_score.py:34: in test_categories_endpoint assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'categories': [{'icon': 'film', 'id': 'movie_stars', 'name': 'Movie Stars'}, {'icon': 'tv', 'id': 'tv_actors', 'name': 'TV Actors'}, {'icon': 'video', 'id': 'tv_personalities', 'name': 'TV Personalities'}, {'icon': 'music', 'id': 'musicians', 'name': 'Musicians'}, {'icon': 'trophy', 'id': 'athletes', 'name': 'Athletes'}, {'icon': 'crown', 'id': 'royals', 'name': 'Royals'}, ...]}, list)

testcase.name: test_hot_celebs_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'hot_celebs': [{'base_price': 10.5, 'category': 'musicians', 'hot_reason': 'Vegas residency', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/7c/Adele_2016.jpg/330px-Adele_2016.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 6.5, 'category': 'royals', 'hot_reason': 'Royal scandal & legal battles', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/24/The_Duke_of_York_in_Belfast_%28cropped_3%29.jpg/330px-The_Duke_of_York_in_Belfast_%28cropped_3%29.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 10.5, 'category': 'public_figure', 'hot_reason': 'Tech & politics headlines', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/5e/Elon_Musk_-_54820081119_%28cropped%29.jpg/330px-Elon_Musk_-_54820081119_%28cropped%29.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 10.5, 'category': 'movie_stars', 'hot_reason': 'Humanitarian & acting', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1f/Angelina_Jolie_at_the_2024_Toronto_International_Film_Festival_%28cropped%29.jpg/330px-Angelina_Jolie_at_the_2024_Toronto_International_Film_Festival_%28cropped%29.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 10.5, 'category': 'athletes', 'hot_reason': 'F1 & fashion', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/d3/Prime_Minister_Keir_Starmer_meets_Sir_Lewis_Hamilton_%2854566928382%29_%28cropped%29.jpg/330px-Prime_Minister_Keir_Starmer_meets_Sir_Lewis_Hamilton_%2854566928382%29_%28cropped%29.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 3.0, 'category': 'reality_tv', 'hot_reason': 'Reality star', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/61/Gemma_Collins_by_Gemma_Collagen.jpg/330px-Gemma_Collins_by_Gemma_Collagen.jpg', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_21_recognition_score.py:118: in test_hot_celebs_endpoint assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'hot_celebs': [{'base_price': 10.5, 'category': 'musicians', 'hot_reason': 'Vegas residency', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/7c/Adele_2016.jpg/330px-Adele_2016.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 6.5, 'category': 'royals', 'hot_reason': 'Royal scandal & legal battles', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/24/The_Duke_of_York_in_Belfast_%28cropped_3%29.jpg/330px-The_Duke_of_York_in_Belfast_%28cropped_3%29.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 10.5, 'category': 'public_figure', 'hot_reason': 'Tech & politics headlines', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/5e/Elon_Musk_-_54820081119_%28cropped%29.jpg/330px-Elon_Musk_-_54820081119_%28cropped%29.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 10.5, 'category': 'movie_stars', 'hot_reason': 'Humanitarian & acting', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1f/Angelina_Jolie_at_the_2024_Toronto_International_Film_Festival_%28cropped%29.jpg/330px-Angelina_Jolie_at_the_2024_Toronto_International_Film_Festival_%28cropped%29.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 10.5, 'category': 'athletes', 'hot_reason': 'F1 & fashion', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/d3/Prime_Minister_Keir_Starmer_meets_Sir_Lewis_Hamilton_%2854566928382%29_%28cropped%29.jpg/330px-Prime_Minister_Keir_Starmer_meets_Sir_Lewis_Hamilton_%2854566928382%29_%28cropped%29.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 3.0, 'category': 'reality_tv', 'hot_reason': 'Reality star', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/61/Gemma_Collins_by_Gemma_Collagen.jpg/330px-Gemma_Collins_by_Gemma_Collagen.jpg', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.name: test_hot_celebs_have_images
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_21_recognition_score.py:135: in test_hot_celebs_have_images celebs_with_images = [c for c in data if c.get("image")] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iteration_21_recognition_score.py:135: in <listcomp> celebs_with_images = [c for c in data if c.get("image")] ^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_transfer_window_status

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'status' in {'current_day': 'Tuesday', 'is_open': False, 'message': 'Transfer window opens Sunday 12pm GMT', 'next_window': '2026-03-01T12:00:00+00:00'}
